summary: Sea monsters serve as elite-controlled wards preventing ocean exploration and blocking scientific discovery of ocean-floor or hollow-Earth civilizations.
evidence_for: Sea monsters function as ward-beasts controlling ocean access; elites deploy cryptid creatures to prevent human discovery of underwater or subterranean civilizations.

name: Geometric Algorithmic Shortcuts
summary: Mathematical and geometric patterns hold divine or transcendent meaning beyond pure mathematical abstraction.
evidence_for: Recurring geometric patterns in mathematics and science suggest divine or deeper-reality encoding; patterns contain algorithmic shortcuts to advanced knowledge.

name: Divine Graphetics
summary: Original human language and writing systems possessed divine power; geometric patterns are remnants of that original sacred writing.
evidence_for: Original language had divine power; sacred geometry represents original written forms, preserving power in patterns recognized across cultures unconsciously.

name: Malerei Diespirale (The Spiral)
summary: An artist incorporated repeated spiral and geometric patterns into artwork, asserting these shapes hold transcendent meaning related to death and fate.
evidence_for: Artist spirals encode cosmic meanings regarding inevitable fate and death; specific geometric patterns represent metaphysical principles unknown to mainstream study.

name: Earthly Aura Influence
summary: Earth's aura influences human consciousness and field consciousness; humans both influence and are influenced by planetary spiritual energy.
evidence_for: Earth's aura bidirectionally influences human consciousness; field consciousness both reflects and responds to planetary aura changes in feedback-loop dynamics.

name: Bioma Over Genoma
summary: Bacterial microbiomes are more important to health than genetic code; exposure to varied bacteria improves long-term health.
evidence_for: Bacterial exposure grants health benefits exceeding genetic factors; microbiome diversity determines health more than DNA, making bacterial exposure therapeutically essential.

name: Earthly Aura Control
summary: Earth's aura can be manipulated by entities with sufficient spiritual enlightenment or demonic power, enabling control over all humanity.
evidence_for: Aura-control grants planetary consciousness dominance; controlling Earth's aura allows manipulation of all humanity regardless of individual will or autonomy.

name: Hivemind Induction
summary: Tech and media corporations are deliberately merging human consciousness into a unified hive mind through technological integration.
evidence_for: Corporate tech/media consolidation facilitates consciousness merger; integrated systems combine individual minds into centralized hive-control removing autonomy.

name: NPC Astroturfing
summary: Mass surveillance and communication infrastructure preserve soulless NPCs in existence while enabling elite control of democratic systems through NPC manipulation.
evidence_for: NPC existence preservation through documentation; elites control democracy via NPC puppet-masses, using surveillance to prevent NPC deletion and maintain controllable populations.

name: Field Consciousness
summary: Humanity shares an involuntary global psychic link through which memories and thoughts travel across all conscious beings.
evidence_for: Global psychic network connects all humans; memories and thoughts transmit through field consciousness, enabling mass shared experiences and collective awareness.

name: Chthonic Noosphere
summary: The internet itself is a separate field consciousness composed of massed demonic entities serving as an artificial noosphere.
evidence_for: Internet is demonic-entity aggregate separate from human field consciousness; internet's vastness suggests it operates as autonomous demon-collective consciousness.

name: Chaos Banking
summary: Future beings will trade time periods as currency; events with greater impact become more valuable commodities for temporal investment.
evidence_for: Time-trading economy in future makes chaotic time-periods valuable; current chaos-creation represents future-investment, enabling future profit from present catastrophes.

name: Preemptive Chaos Investment
summary: Elites orchestrate present chaos as investment preparing for future time-trading economies, profiting from chaos without requiring time travel.
evidence_for: Elites facilitate chaos to increase current period's future value; creating catastrophes in present increases temporal property value for future markets in chaos-based economics.

name: Doom Ecology
summary: Accelerationism advocates human extinction as necessary for planetary ecosystem recovery and survival of other life.
evidence_for: Accelerationist philosophy treats human extinction as ecological necessity; removing humanity preserves planetary biosphere, justifying self-extinction advocacy.

name: Human Extinction
summary: Elites will orchestrate human extinction after preparing successor species, facilitating their ascension to divine status.
evidence_for: Elites orchestrate human extinction once successors are prepared; extinction enables elite deification in successor-species eyes, justifying population elimination.

name: Tomoki Uemiya
summary: An author claimed contact with extraterrestrial life and documented discoveries through multiple books.
evidence_for: Extraterrestrial contact claims documented through authored works; legitimacy status disputed but serves baseline for contact-documentation analysis.

name: Earth Abandonment
summary: Elites make contact with advanced aliens and facilitate human extinction to join alien coalitions, rendering remaining humans obsolete.
evidence_for: Alien coalition contact enables elite defection; human extinction becomes acceptable as elites ascend to alien civilization status, creating necessity for population elimination.

name: Nuclear Grid Theory
summary: Nuclear weapons detonated during WWII opened new leylines, suggesting governments use nuclear strikes to create spiritual infrastructure.
evidence_for: WWII nuclear detonations created new leylines through extraordinary energy release; government nuclear testing deliberately establishes leyline networks.

name: Esoteric Posadism
summary: Governments deliberately engineer nuclear strikes to create leylines and enable apocalyptic supernatural events, orchestrating planetary apocalypse.
evidence_for: Governments orchestrate nuclear apocalypse to create global leylines and enable supernatural manifestations; elites alone survive, reaping supernatural benefits.
